scripts.build:packages: npm run -w @d-dash/core build && npm run -w @d-dash/adapter-echarts build && npm run -w @d-dash/adapter-gridstack build && npm run -w @d-dash/datasource-rest build && npm run -w @d-dash/datasource-victoriametrics build && npm run -w @d-dash/datasource-grpc build
scripts.build:release: npm run clean && npm run build:packages && npm run verify:exports
scripts.test: npm run -w @d-dash/core test && npm run -w @d-dash/adapter-echarts test && npm run -w @d-dash/adapter-gridstack test && npm run -w @d-dash/datasource-rest test && npm run -w @d-dash/datasource-victoriametrics test && npm run -w @d-dash/datasource-grpc test
scripts.release:prepare: npm run lint && npm run build:release && npm run test && npm run docs:api && npm run release:check:metadata
scripts.release:version: changeset version && git add . && git commit -m "chore(release): version packages"
scripts.release:publish: npm run release:prepare && changeset publish && git push --follow-tags origin main
scripts.release: npm run release:version && npm run release:publish
scripts.release:dry-run: npm run release:prepare && node scripts/publish-packages.mjs dry-run
